case_title: GOOD GUYS, INC. RESPONDENT VS. CARMAN PASCUA APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED FOR ERIC CHANG
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT PASCUA, CARMAN AS TO RESPONDENT GOOD GUYS, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED FOR FOAN HUYNH

ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR ON WED., 24MAR04, 9:00AM; BOTH SIDES APPEAR IN D-525 FOR SCA HEARING; RESPONDENT GOOD GUYS, INC. DOES NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM; THE MATTER IS SENT TO D-206 FOR RE-ASSIGNMENT. JUDGE: PRO TEM JUDGE RICHARD A. HORNING; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, WED., 24MAR04).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOOD GUYS, INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT PASCUA, CARMAN ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $111.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
